questions.question:
Which of the following terms are used to describe the fact that attitudes must be inferred from an individual's overt response to a stimulus?



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist C | Section E | Question: 145

Which of the following best describes cognitive dissonance?



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist D | Section E | Question: 137
options: An emotional attachment to the organization and a belief in its values.
Dissatisfaction expressed through behaviour directed toward leaving the organization.
Attitudes used after the fact to make sense out of behaviour.
Any incompatibility between two or more attitudes or between behaviour and attitudes.
questions.correct_answer: Any incompatibility between two or more attitudes or between behaviour and attitudes.
